DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE]
( 
	[LeadSubSourceID] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[LeadSourceID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[SourceCode] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LeadSubSource] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Active] [bit]  NULL,
	[LP_LeadSubSourceID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_LeadSourceID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [DATETIME]  NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE
)
GO
